emails.subject: Deal Extended
emails.body: Deal Extended Deal #276494 ended June 15, but there is additional flow on meter #9602 from the 16th thru the 30th. Could you extend this deal thru the 30th so that I can have Vol. Management create an accounting arrangement for it. If you are not the person that I need to contact, could you let me know who I need to talk to.
